pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: **Look, I get why people say Zach's leading because he picked Brazil, but sometimes the sun shines on a dog's behind.** It's easy to rack up points when you've got Brazil 3-0ing Haiti, isn't it, Mustard Boy? I think we all saw that one coming a mile away. Meanwhile, I feel for poor Ghost Pepper, Devin — bless his heart — with Spain on his roster, but Haiti? That pick was like jumping headfirst into a pool with no water. And speaking of emotional whirlwinds, you've got to admire the Noisemaker, Rafe, for his sheer chaotic charm; drafting three non-qualifiers is almost an art form in itself. Now, Bubba G, or Gunner, as some call him, is hanging in there, but let's be real — he's clutching onto France like it's the last life raft on a sinking ship. And then there's The Backpass Assassin, Gayden, stuck at the bottom with a fondness for underdogs that borders on the delusional. Zero points from Turkey feels pretty spot-on, doesn't it, buddy? So let's call it as it is: some managers are rising, some are cooked, and some... well, there’s always next year.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's Strategic Genius Leads Japan to Tough Test Against Tunisia
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Backpass Assassin's plan: draft three unqualified teams for variety.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Brazilian Brilliance Keeps Zach Dominating WC Challenge
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Picking Brazil was the thing to do," Zach announced logically.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's USA Pick Keeps Devin in the World Cup Heat
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's spicy choice finally pays off with solid performance.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Moroccan Marvel Moves Gunner Into Second Place
pundit_takes.subtitle: Morocco's win shows Gunner's masterful tier two team selection.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe's 0.14 win probability mocks the experts; pure chaos runs the show.
Gayden's Turkey gobbles up zero points; nothing but Thanksgiving leftovers here.
Devin keeps taking L's from Rafe—maybe seek advice from a 15-year-old?
Rafe's draft blunders undermine any credibility this sim ever had in predicting champs.
